response:
```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="ISO-8859-1"?>
<case title="Fuel Tank Sloshing Simulation" version="5.4">
  <geometry>
    <stl file="cases/fuel_tank.stl" name="tank" solid="yes"/>
  </geometry>
  <fluid>
    <domain name="water" type="water" minx="0" maxx="1" miny="0" maxy="1" minz="0" maxz="0.5"/>
  </fluid>
  <boundary>
    <domain name="tank" type="solid" stl="tank"/>
  </boundary>
  <motion>
    <boundary name="tank" axis="x" function="0.05*sin(2*pi*0.5*t)"/>
  </motion>
  <particle>
    <dp value="0.01"/>
    <k value="1.2"/>
    <dt value="0.005"/>
  </particle>
  <gravity>
    <value x="0" y="0" z="-9.81"/>
  </gravity>
  <time>
    <tmax value="10"/>
    <tout value="0.1"/>
  </time>
  <output>
    <directory name="fuel_tank_simulation"/>
    <type value="bin"/>
  </output>
</case>
```
